content.rendered:
Heather Mansfield of Nonprofit Tech for Good and @NonprofitOrgs is available to live report from your conference or event. Using her 1,000,000+ online community, Heather will blog, tweet, storify, photograph, stream, record, and share your conference or event in order to significantly increase the exposure of your organization’s online brand.

The fee is $1,500 per day (+travel expenses) and includes all pre-event planning and promotion as well as post-event evaluation. A two-day minimum booking is required. For more information, please email Heather Mansfield at heather@nptechforgood.com.

Conferences and Events 2017

NTEN Conference

International Fundraising Conference
Live Tour of The Hague, Netherlands & Site Visits with NGOs
